CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DANIEL DEAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
OFF CALENDAR ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO DEFT.
DECLARATION FROM THE PLAINTIFF STATING THAT THE INSURANCE COMPANY'S ADDRESS BE PUT AS THE DEFT'S ADDRESS.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-15-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF HANKS, KRISNA L.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANKS, KRISNA L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODGERS, JOYCE $2,969.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,046.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
